storyboard.content: I have been feeling unusually tired all the time for the past few months
I have been gaining weight even though I have not changed what I eat
I feel cold all the time even when everyone else around me is comfortable
My skin has become really dry and my hair seems to be thinning
I have been feeling more depressed than usual, which is not like me
These symptoms have been coming on slowly over the past four to six months
My energy and mood are significantly affected but I can still get through my day
I am a 42-year-old woman with no significant medical history
